channel.title: 2026-04-01 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-04-01 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Quantum Sensing of Displacements with Stabilized Gottesman-Kitaev-Preskill States
item.description:
📚 PRX Quantum
👤 Lautaro Labarca, Sara Turcotte, Alexandre Blais, and Baptiste Royer
Author(s): Lautaro Labarca, Sara Turcotte, Alexandre Blais, and Baptiste Royer A noise-resilient quantum displacement sensor utilizing stabilized GKP states continuously surpasses the Gaussian limit of displacement sensing to approach sensitivity bounds, unlocking pathways for force sensing and waveform estimation. [PRX Quantum 7, 020301] Published Wed Apr 01, 2026
